rulings.Case Title: CHARLES LI VS. THAI MING CHIU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Reconsider Order Denying Defs' Joint Mtn For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 4, 2014, Line 3: DEFENDANTS THAI CHIU and KAMAN LIU'S Motion To Reconsider Order Denying Defendants' Joint Motion For Sanctions: DENIED. Defendants' Motion is not based on new/different facts, circumstances or law. All the authorities cited in support of this motion were available to the defendant after the tentative ruling has been issued and before the oral argument. Additionally, as in the original motion Defendants failed to show that the complaint is presented for improper purpose, that the claims in the complaint are not warranted by existing law, that factual contentions are not likely to have evidentiary support after a reasonable opportunity for discovery. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALZ LEE, LLC et al VS. SHACUAN SHARON LEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Appointing Receiver For Real Property At 350 Beach Street
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 4, 2014, Line 13: PLAINTIFFS ALZ LEE, PKL REAL PROPERTY ASSETS, STEPHEN & SUSAN LEE LEGACY, 3 BEACH BOYS, LEE LEGACY INVESTMENTS and ZACKARY WONG'S Motion For Order Appointing Receiver For Real Property At 350 Beach Street: GRANTED. Parties shall meet and confer regarding the receiver and the bond amount. If parties cannot agree on a receiver, each party shall submit 3 names to the Court no later September 15, 2014 by 9:30 a.m. Each party may submit their objections as to the other party's candidates no later than September 19, 2014 by 4:30 p.m. Moving party to prepare order leaving the name of the receiver and the amount of the bond blank. (501/REQ)
